content.text: Now let me check if there are any other important project directories that should be synced:

arguments.command:
# Check for other git repos that might be project-relevant
for dir in ~/Projects ~/Developer ~/repos ~/code ~/Desktop; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read gitdir; do
      repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
      echo "REPO: $repo"
    done
  fi
done
echo "---DONE---"
